meaning: Discrete text units and the next-token training/inference game.
allowed_uses: Use for tokenization, generation sequence, context accounting, pricing units, and final synthesis.
blocked_claims: Exact tokenizer output; universal token boundaries; truth; understanding; cost equivalence across providers.
render_rule: Use repeated pills only when count is conceptual; label "schematic" unless values are extracted.

meaning: User instruction, task framing, and context given to a model.
allowed_uses: Use for the human-to-model handoff, prompt surfaces, tool instructions, and repository-as-context figures.
blocked_claims: Prompting as reliable control; user intent fully captured; safety; productivity; autonomy.
render_rule: Pair with a response/check marker when the figure could imply that prompting alone solves the task.

meaning: Chronology, release order, roadmap status, and cutoff boundaries.
allowed_uses: Use for launch order, source dates, roadmap-vs-shipped distinctions, and May 24 2026 cutoff reminders.
blocked_claims: Future events as happened facts; priority claims; inevitable progress; stale live-page truth.
render_rule: Use a vertical cutoff tick when figures reach the factual boundary.

meaning: Accelerators, memory, interconnect, CUDA/software substrate, and hardware bottlenecks.
allowed_uses: Use for silicon-to-system explanations, training/inference split, rack-scale systems, and compute constraints.
blocked_claims: Performance crown; supply share; yield; availability; market dominance; cost per token without data.
render_rule: Keep chip icons attached to source or mechanism labels, not decorative backgrounds.

meaning: Electricity, interconnection, cooling, physical supply, and speed-to-power pressure.
allowed_uses: Use for power-to-token flows, grid process, procurement-vs-delivery, and infrastructure tradeoffs.
blocked_claims: Delivered electrons; emissions outcome; named-campus workload; solved grid constraint; energy-per-token.
render_rule: Always pair power motif with a source/caveat label when connected to a facility or numeric claim.

meaning: Long context, retrieved evidence, source windows, repository context, and what is inside/outside the model's view.
allowed_uses: Use for context-window figures, RAG, repository prompts, tool observations, and source-boundary diagrams.
blocked_claims: Complete memory; guaranteed grounding; full repository understanding; solved hallucination; unlimited context.
render_rule: Draw an explicit outside-the-window zone when the motif appears in trust or tool chapters.

meaning: Bounded action through tools, tests, permissions, review, and human handoff.
allowed_uses: Use for agent loops, function calls, coding-agent workflows, permission gates, and review boundaries.
blocked_claims: Autonomous engineer; developer replacement; secure-by-default code; productivity lift; solved safety.
render_rule: Every agency loop must show at least one check, permission, or human-review node.
